title: • Judgment liens
content:
• Judgment liens
  • Cost: $0.10 per page + scraping service

    1. Alternative Data Providers
      • Web traffic data (SimilarWeb, Semrush)
      • Mobile app analytics (Sensor Tower)
      • Social media signals (Brandwatch)

    1. Proprietary ML Models
      • Custom bankruptcy prediction models
      • Churn risk scoring
      • Growth trajectory forecasting

    MCP Integration Architecture



    Use Model Context Protocol servers to abstract data sources:

    // src/lib/mcp/data-mcp-server.ts
    import { Server } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/index.js';
    import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js';

    class DataEnrichmentMCP {
    constructor(private tier: 'free' | 'starter' | 'professional' | 'enterprise') {}
